title: Advanced Debug
description: Is your default F3 screen not enough? We got you!
body:
### Note that the beta versions can crash Minecraft

# Advanced Debug
_Is your default `F3` screen not enough? We got you!_

## Features
 * Multiple pages for the debug menu, and is changeable using F4 for keybind by default. (Also holding shift will go to the previous one instead of the next one)
 * ImGui based debugging menu. `WIP` `Since 2.3.0`
 * Modding API available, with the ability to create pages and formatters for the objects (such as integers, strings specific enums etc.).
 * Keybinding is separate for the default one without interfering the default debug menu.
 * Hopefully, there will be more features coming soon.
